assessment_objectives.objective: cybersecurity / data privacy attributes that require association and integrity maintenance are defined.
subjects requiring the association and integrity of cybersecurity / data privacy attributes to such subjects to be maintained are defined.
objects requiring the association and integrity of cybersecurity / data privacy attributes to such objects to be maintained are defined.
the association and integrity of organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes to organization-defined subjects is maintained.
the association and integrity of organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes to organization-defined objects is maintained.
